stimulus: Nitrogen fixation, the biochemical process by which certain bacteria convert atmospheric nitrogen into ammonia usable by ______blank depends in part on an enzyme called nitrogenase that breaks the otherwise stable triple bond of the nitrogen molecule.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The convention being tested is the punctuation of a supplementary element within a sentence. The comma after “plants” pairs with the comma after “fixation” to separate the supplementary element “the biochemical process by which certain bacteria convert atmospheric nitrogen into ammonia usable by plants” from the rest of the sentence. This element defines “nitrogen fixation.”

Choice A is incorrect because it fails to set off the supplementary element. Choice B is incorrect because a coordinating conjunction can’t pair with a comma to set off a supplement. Choice D is incorrect because a dash can’t pair with a comma in this way.
